_comment: Earnest. cast voice registry. Lock once a character has a voice, never edit. Source of truth for which Voice ID + which platform + which settings produces each character. Replace TBD placeholders as voices get cast in production. AI voice disclosure flows from this file into the credits crawl on every microsite episode page.

narrator.name: The Voice
narrator.voiceDesignPrompt: Mid-40s American voice. Slightly weathered timbre, attentive listener, pauses to think before speaking. Literate but never literary. Wry without being arch. Warmth that earns trust without selling. Reads like someone who has noticed the thing you missed. Sarah Koenig's attentiveness, Ira Glass's confidence, Anthony Bourdain's restraint. Never preachy. Never explanatory. Never breaks the spell.

linda.name: Linda
linda.register: late-60s American woman, warm but contained, slight Pacific Northwest plain-speaker
